item.title: Random thoughts I shared this day last year.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
i see one dog, and a rug
this is a personal attack on me
Stevie is actually not so whiny about food. but if you miss his 7pm Laser Time, beware
what could go wrong?
McDs in the 90s definitely hit different. but the latest QPs are actually pretty good too. i just miss the 90s prices
i never tire of watching this movie. the songs are genius
finally
booking my flight now
mmm hmm
life is cruel sometimes
the mandolin is an underrated instrument. check out Jerry Garcia's collabs with mando master David Grisman
it's very unique looking?
obviously
urine is moving up
sounds rough
as is tradition
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Images of Note: cheat codes probably
item.description:
I C E
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii We now have fake ads.
Don't....don't do this to me.
very small
10/10 good pants
I need an axe.
This dump was brought to you by Bricks.
Ahhh fuck. I can't believe you've done this.
Foolish Mortals is a good thing to say to be honest
SUMMER IS ICUMMEN IN
(It's a Bingocard
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREAM! http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: There's no debate on this one, that's just facs
item.description: Edit: Before yall come for me more, this is a joke ? I am also a women and I'm not trying to "turn women against each other" it's a meme lmfaoo obviously they both have they're thing but I personally love Moana more bc she literally SAVED HER ENTIRE TRIBE ? Ariel went off to live her dream and we love that but Moana did some seriously inspiring shit!

item.title: Some Saturday Morning Memetoons
item.description:
I
Hope
Everyone
Reading
These
Has
A
Truly
Wonderful
Saturday.
It’s
Getting
Hot
In
Texas
These
Days.
Memes
Make
The
World
Go
‘Round.
I
Hope
In
100
Years
Memes
Will
Be
Considered
A
Love
Language.
GIFs
Too,
Honestly.
Be
Kind
To
Yourself! ?

item.title: It's the best thing I've seen today.
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: It will be a much better long term value.
item.description: Kids watch the same movies over and over again. With these three libraries I can escape 2 subscription fees and put my money somewhere that will have a longer lasting impact on his development. And ethically, I am over it. I'm done paying a subscription fee just so my kids can watch Totoru and Cars and Frozen over and over and over again. And when you do pay for the movie via cloud service, it can be taken away at any time because their contract with a studio changed. Any tips for streaming capture techniques for PC via DM would be very much appreciated.
item.dc:creator: METROlD

item.title: The Void Dumps Back - Episode 29
item.description:
Hello all! Happy weekend to all who celebrate. Remember! You can click on a image, and at the top it will tell you the image number. Also, click on the comment bubble to comment on it, with the link already made for you! If you knew this already, awesome! If not, well now you know!  <3 (This doesn't work on the old site layout. Sorry)
To protect the world fr devastation...
MOTHMAN! MOTHMAN! MOTHMAN!
Kind of? Kind of a pre-Hobbit. If I remember correctly.
For real. And the second one, you'd just be staring at the lake. The unbroken surface of the lake.
Hope everyone has a good day! If this is not the case, I hope tomorrow is better.
item.dc:creator: DaBaDoop

item.title: As is written
item.description: I know of nobody who did not want kids in their 30s, who regrets it in their 50s
item.dc:creator: Fanner50

item.title: MRW the neighbor renting the house next door knocks on mine at 10pm to ask me to shut my A/C off.
item.description: Uncomfortably awkward confrontation tonight, not made better by someone knocking on my front door while I'm trying to sleep. She insisted the air conditioner unit for my house was too noisy for her to sleep, and thus I need to turn it off. I humored her enough to go out to listen to it, and it's quiet as ever. It gets regular service, and the noise she isn't liking is when the compressor charges up. I explained to her that the compressor is going to make some noise no matter what, that's how they work, and it's no louder than it was when it was first installed. Our houses are maybe 50ft apart so if they have their windows open, they'll hear it. That's just how sound works. She didn't want to hear it and just kept hammering on how it's too noisy for her, it shouldn't be on the side of the house it's on, it sounds like a truck engine, yadda yadda. I didn't know a clever way to end that mess of an encounter and ended up suggesting she shut her window, then went back inside. Fifty fifty odds on her calling an ordinance officer or some nonsense, but if she does the A/C will be whirring away for them to do whatever. In the meantime I moved the Ring camera I use to check on Story (my cat) to the window above the A/C unit, because I don't trust her tonight. Bleh.
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: Wishing Well
item.description: Sometimes the best wish is the well kind.
item.dc:creator: aideesea
